reviews.review_description: WHY IS NO ONE IN MULTIPLAYER!!!!!🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪

developer_response.body: Hey! Were glad you're enjoying Block Buster. We understand the frustration of no one being online. Join our Discord at BlockBusterVR and group up with players in there. Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: For a long time, I was thinking some Monster games could be a dream, and yet this game is a dream come true. Finally, a Kaiju game for VR which you can be the monster. It’s one of the most fun I ever had. I highly recommend it.

This is GREAT! The kaiju are greatly designed, the levels have heavy lore dumps when you pay attention, I plan to make content for this game to revive it! I will attempt to make this mainstream and show those hand movement ape horror slop games what a REAL joystick movement game is! Also, what's up with the UFOs in the Machine of Mayhem box art? This could be part of some new passive ability feature and then there could other passive abilities for the other kaiju in the future! And when is this octopus fella coming out? I really like his design!

- With all sincerity, PowerPlex

Edit: Thank you for your response! I plan to put together the lore across videos and making regular content. And one more thing, is it ok if I make 3D printed cosplay sets of the characters for downloads? I don't plan to make it a business thing, more like an activity players could do. Again, thank you for responding!

developer_response.body:
Hey PowerPlex!

Thank you so much for the kind review. We are happy to hear you are loving Block Buster! The lore is totally hidden within the level details and we appreciate you pointing that out! As for the Machine of Mayhem box cover, We were trying to show that this particular character is not really from Earth, meaning, its machinery is totally from Earth and developed by Kai Tech, but the origin of its power is other worldly. We went with a different direction with its power too thinking it was too closely related to Richterscale and Clawtastrophy. We felt the players deserved some variety with the powers so we turned M.0.M.'s hands into explosive rocket fists! As for the Octopus, he was actually a boss for a canceled level. Our level 6 was going to be a play on Chicago that lead you to the end of Navy Pier where you would have to battle it by avoiding  tentacle slam downs and ink projectiles that could blind you. The object was to grab the tentacles when they stuck to the ground, and rip them off which would leave it stunned. Then you could throw blocks at it and punch it in the face to damage. It was going to be glorious, but with budget and scheduling issues, we had to push it to the side and finish the rest of the game. We ended up developing multiplayer instead, which we feel is a great hurdle for Block Buster. 

We would appreciate any content you can put together! There's a possibility we can add this level back into Block Buster if the demand is there. Thank you for being a fan of our game!

reviews.review_description: I love this game, but I don’t know why people don’t play this because every time I hop on there’s nobody in any servers so I am forced to play alone that’s the only cat really when I really hope these to become more common because I would really hope of the new Kaijus of that’s how you spell it but the rest of it is fun. You’ve got so many levels to play wish that was wrong but also I really love the abilities and I was hoping you could add another abilities like each level you would find ability crates and you would unlock different abilities and you could upgrade your monster and that you could fight a robot￼ like Titan playground but I can playground is £5 so you have more quality but I would really wish I could fight someone and I would wonder if you could actually add all the Kaiju Godzilla and King Kong I mean like that in the game but it’s not named right ￼ can you not like change the name I know this might seem long I was wondering if you could I’d like a map like a sky map or you could add like a giant plane that you like? You can hook on planes or like you can climb higher buildings and you should definitely add like other Caused to fight. I not like real people like others like they interfere with each other kiss some ideas. Anyways of your reading this I’m really sorry I might’ve not spelt anything right because I was too bothered LOL to write this so it might be loads of mistakes but you get it right ￼

you can design your kaiju to destroy a city level If you complete primary objectives you can advance to the next level. my fav part of the game is skins you can buy skins but you can’t advance to the next level. that’s my review!!!!

developer_response.body: Howdy! Thank you for taking the time to write a review for Block Buster. We're happy to hear you like the gameplay and extra content. As part of the progression, we have it set so you must complete each primary objective in a level in order to advance. BUT, all the levels with the exception to level 5 should be available in Free Play for you to check out as well. Don't forget multiplayer monster mash with friends as well. Thank you again for your kind words. Keep up the smashing!

reviews.review_description:
The gameplay is pretty good but the art style is really unappealing and the controls often feel clunky. In addition the destruction is mediocre and and everything feels like cardboard. The sound design also hurts my ears.

Still though, not terrible and still fun but definitely not $20 fun

3/10
couldnt even find a part of a monster body

developer_response.body: Hello, Sory to hear you're having trouble finding body parts! If its giving you a hard time, we have tons of videos on our Youtube channel that shows you exactly how to locate each monster costume piece. Hope this information helps!

reviews.review_description: im trying to climb up the tower to get to the next platfork and i feel like im on the sun and have its gravity and immediately fall when i let go

developer_response.body: Hi, sorry to hear you're having trouble with climbing. A couple of tips. Your hands highlight green when you're able to climb. Make sure your hands are green and then use the grab (inner grip) to climb the walls. Also, there are dumpsters that are falling downward and are difficult to see. You need to avoid being hit by the dumpsters. If you get hit, your hands will automatically open up and you will fall. You can catch yourself to save yourself, but it is fast. Apologies for this. Hope it helps. Thanks for playing!

developer_response.body: Hey! Thanks for checking out Block Buster. We're glad you're having fun. If you check out our discord we made an announcement regarding our next steps as a studio and what to expect from us in the future. Thank you again for your support!

reviews.review_description:
It's good for what it is.. I'm playing it free on horizon +.. The objectives keep me motivated, I don't play multi player mode, and whilst I first jumped in the game for a couple of mins fun, I stayed in longer to find everything on the maps.
I understand that things can get old pretty fast but I'm glad to play it still. The whole mechanic of finding pieces and building the costumes etc I feel the game is obviously aimed at young players, however I'm still having fun, and I'm still returning to the game.

So, the FIRST scene i wasnt for sure--> just another simple graphics do w/e game...but the next day it hit me! got back in and sure enough its pretty much RAMPAGE!! I love it! Im pretty well 'old school' so much of the new age VR cheap stuff doesnt appeal to me. But in my opinion 'old school' concepts in VR is MY thing and this does it pretty well. To be honest i forgot all about that game until now and i used to play the heck out of that at the arcade, one of my favs.

THANKS!

reviews.review_description: Tried it, don’t think I’ll be going back. I quickly got frustrated because I got to a zone, seemed like I destroyed everything, but I couldn’t find the generator. Maybe there wasn’t one?  Who knows. All I could do at that point was wait to die, since I had no other idea what I was supposed to be doing.And apparently much of the game is a scavenger hunt to find the other monster parts?  I have zero interest in that sort of thing. And is there really a point?  In a first-person game, does it matter what you look like?  And finally, the smooth motion completely laid me out. Never got as sick as that in vr. Yes, you can teleport, but that’s very clunky.

I love this game but it isn't very helpful for me as I have stick drift. I have an idea to let me play more if there was an option to use your arms to crawl (not like gorilla tag movement) forward instead. This would be really useful for me so please try and make this happen.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for letting us know about your stick drift issue. You can also teleport with the A and X button. You can alternate the button presses to walk like a giant monster. There is a slight cooldown to step the bigger you become. You will notice a footprint on the ground when teleporting. Press and release to move. You can step on people and cars too. I hope this helps!

reviews.review_description: Really good but gets boring when there's no updates for months

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for letting us know you love Block Buster and sorry you've not heard from us in a while. We are super busy behind the scenes working on something ultra mega awesome for the community! It is taking us a really long time, but we are excited to tell you about it. I can't say a whole lot in this comment, but there is more info in our discord @blockbustervr We hope to see you there!

reviews.review_description:
Really fun game, and very reminiscent of the 1986 arcade classic Rampage, but with a modern twist. You can definitely tell that there has been a lot of love and passion put into the game, with lots of little details and interactions in both the hub world and when you're out stomping.
It's been fun hunting down the secrets and trying to do as many challenges as possible in a run, and although there's only five main levels (which are open ended enough for added replayability), they each feel fresh and unique to each other, even if the core gameplay is the same - the gameplay itself being simple, yet satisfying!

Speaking of stomping, it would be great to have a dedicated "stomp" function to go with the "roar"! We have a button free...

developer_response.body: Hey! Thank you so much for your kind review! We are so happy to hear you are enjoying Block Buster! We absolutely love messing around with the humans in the game and seeing what we can do with them! Did you know that there is a stomping feature? If you press and hold the A or X button, a footprint will appear on the ground. Once the footprint is hovered over a human or vehicle, release it and crunch your target! There are a lot of things to do with the people, actually! You can pop their heads off by pressing down the joystick. You can cook them on a fence or with fire breath, you can skip them across water like rocks, you can throw them at other players and see if they can be caught... with your mouth! Theres so much to do with the people and we are here for it! Thank you so much again for your review! Keep Smashing!

developer_response.body:
On Youtube, search "how to find Gorerilla in Block Buster vr" This video tells you how to find him. It might help to go into the free play level of Mt. Sakura and walk around to see where secret spots could be. Be sure to walk on the outside pathways up the mountain. Some of the paths shoot off to the side. You'll see huge stones with paintings on them. 

I hope this helps! Have fun!

developer_response.body:
Hi Thank you for bringing this to our attention and apologies that your progress seems to have reset.

There are a few reasons as to how this happened. Since Block Buster does not have cloud saving, we rely on local file saves within the headset. This means that if you reset your headset, or get a new headset, that your saved data will not carry over to your new game profile. The exception to this is if you purchase skins. If you have purchased skins then the monsters stay unlocked. 

Very rarely, your progress can reset if you are switching between accounts on the same headset. This is an issue contained within the backend of the operating system which we do not have any control over.

I do apologize for this annoyance and I wish there was more I could do to help you get your stuff back. However, if you're up to it, hop on youtube and check out our channel @happykamperpictures. We walk through all the levels and where all the locations of hidden items are at. 

Also, be sure to join our discord @blockbustervr as we are cooking up something extra special that we have yet to reveal to the public!

developer_response.body:
Hi thank you for joining us on our first ever game development journey which is Block Buster! We launched this game about 2 years ago and have added a TON of new features along the way with multiplayer being the largest addition to the game. We decided to stick to free play multiplayer and give players the choice to set their game up to their liking as we found that our player base really likes autonomy and less of the challenges single player brings to the table. 

In terms of the purchasable skins, we finally implemented these after countless requests from the player base to add in more skins and monsters. This was the latest update we added in Block Buster and it came at a cost to our very small business. In order to continue to develop for Block Buster and future titles, we must resort to charging for extra content as the previous updates for the first 2 years were all free to players. We do understand your concerns regarding these tactics and it is our hope that we will not have to resolve to these types of behaviors in future titles. If you follow us on discord (@blockbustervr) I promise you will start seeing more stuff coming from our team along with other original titles not yet announced :) 

Thank you again for your support and we hope you continue to enjoy playing Block Buster!

reviews.review_description:
The games throwing mechanic is horrible. It just throws all over the place. Only way you can kill some enemies.

I was hoping you can climb building too for a Rampage experience

developer_response.body:
Hello, thank you for letting us know about your experience. We designed the throwing in Block Buster to be automated by being able to look at an enemy while a red target appears. Once the target appears, you can throw an object and it should take it out. If you are throwing an object and it goes in a completely different direction than intended, that means you are locked onto an enemy that is not within your line of site. We apologize for this as this is something that can happen, but is not game breaking. The best way to fix this issue is to look away from all enemies and look back at them to in order to lock onto one. 

We also have 2 levels that exhibit climbing and are both available in freeplay mode for you to enjoy without having to unlock the levels in singleplayer. Park Central and Megablock are the 2 levels you can climb in. They are levels 3 and 4.

We also have difficulty modes available which can award you more or less points based on your difficulty level if you are finding the game to be difficult in any way. 

Thank you again for your support and expressing your concerns. We hope these tips allow for a better experience.

The monster designs are original, but I want there to be assigned where you can turn off people being able to grab your stuff and multiplayer and will there be a new monster because in the wardrobe,.there’s a picture of a squid and a shark and in some of happy kamper videos you guys have a shark costume I have a tik tok video about if you guys potential rename your shark monster and a boss checkpoint map, and houses and level name his special attack is summoning a wave and can we get figures of the fire bird and dragon. Like the big figures or mini figures.

developer_response.body: Thank you for letting us know you like Block Buster as well asking about the new monsters! We are working towards something BIG at the moment, but need a little more time as we continue to roll out additional multiplayer levels. I like you suggestion of the shark power. We were thinking about some kind of wave you can ride on and charge forward with too! Finally, thank you for watching our videos! We will continue to release more content both in the game and on YouTube. Sit tight for just a while longer! Thank you for your support and we hope you continue having fun smashing and bashing!

It’s underwhelming and childish in design. Laughable graphics and design. Just Ridiculous! Come on guys! It’s terrible and very, very low budget. Meta should never have opened the door and allowed low budget game developers in. It’s Just flooding the Meta store with cheep game titles. What a shame.  The only ones that wouldn’t know it’s a terrible game are toddlers and grandkids. It’s a 1 star game and will probably remain 1 star. I want my money back META!!!
Good

So if you ever wanted to “Hulk Smash” a city, heres a chance.

So much potential with the QUEST 2 but nobody that has any idea kn what consists of an actual game worth buying.  Stay away from this game. Its a massive waste of time effort and money for nothing.

developer_response.body:
Hey! Block Busters multiplayer is now available. Hop into monster mash mode or co op free play with friends. Hope you give us a another shot. Thanks again!

We're sorry to hear that Block Buster isn't for you. Thank you for taking the time to express your concerns to us. As a new developer, we try as hard as we can to make sure our game is as engaging as possible. We are currently striving to increase ways to dispose of humans, implementing leaderboards and achievements, and adding our second phase to multiplayer. Again, sorry that Block Buster wasn't what you had in mind. 

I will say that at one point, we were working on climbable buildings that you could continuously punch, but ran into hurdles that would cause us to lose time and budget, and thus, having to shelve it for a later date. We did add climbing mechanics to later levels like Park Central and Mega Block (Level 3 and 4). We also wanted to make a game revolved around the classic monster movie fandom, universes, and collectibles. 

Lastly, we have a great community of kaiju lovers on discord. We invite you to offer more feedback and suggestions. We try our best to absorb as many requests as possible. If you would like to see something added, then please follow the link: https://discord.gg/EQZkzdcJtx

reviews.review_description:
Not my cup of tea, but might be fun for a you get audience, the ones that Meta recommends shouldn’t be playing VR in the first place. 

The graphics are simple and blocky, the action is repetitive. Yes, you get to act like a Kaiju, destroying cities, eating people, and growing in size, but the mechanics aren’t engaging, and the most fun aspect, multiplayer destruction, has yet to be implemented. 

Hard to recommend unless your kids really want it. Search YouTube for Block Buster 6DOF Reviews and see for yourself!

developer_response.body:
Hey 6DOF, we added our multiplayer update as part of our one year anniversary. Sorry for the wait! With a game like Block Buster with lots of physics objects, making VR multiplayer games takes a lot of time, effort, and replication. Now we have it! Feel free to revisit Block Buster when you can. we've added tons of updates to the game since release. 

Thank you for your review. Sorry to hear Block Buster wasn't for you just yet. We want to deliver the best monster experience possible in VR and feedback like this is valuable to us. We plan to release our multiplayer features in stages and hope that you come back to experience them when we do.

*Update: Thank you again for letting us know your thoughts on Block Buster. We now have tutorials available on how to play! https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLz3MCOvWjtCqBn_bXHmJdmlXLlVSu721q

We are currently working towards several improvements which include movement and expanding multiplayer. Your voices are being heard and we want everyone to enjoy their experience. Again, we're sorry Block Buster isn't for you just yet. Be sure to join our discord to stay updated on our progress and to provide more feedback. https://discord.gg/6wKG7TGyhX

reviews.review_description: This is a fun game in all but I am unlucky enough to have a drift on my controlers where it makes me turn without me moving the joystick so if y’all can make it where you can disable turn will make a huge difference. Also please make it to where I can not teleport I am confrontable with it. With these changes it will be a five star game.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: We're excited to inform you that smooth movement is now available in Block Buster. We hope this helps with your controller issue and is also a step in the right direction! This addition adds a really fun layer to the game. So thanks for the suggestions. Please keep them coming and stay tuned for more updates!

Thank you for your comments. We're happy to hear that you are enjoying Block Buster but sorry that you are experiencing issues. Good news though, because adding turning options is one of our highest priority fixes expected in our first patch. And we appreciate knowing how this might be an issue to players with your specific problem. Movement options have been added to our roadmap as well, but these updates will take a bit longer.

If you have any more comments for the team please join our discord: https://discord.gg/azJZDFq3

Tips and Tricks for Block Buster will be coming soon.

reviews.review_description: After I got help the game got really fun. Would recommend you playing

developer_response.body:
Hi, sorry to hear you are having trouble with our level selection mechanic. The way you get out of free play is to press the upward arrow key next to the level doorway in your room. When you play the main game, you will be able to discover hidden monster suit pieces in each city. Bay City, the first city, has 3 yellow colored boxes you must touch to collect. Once you collect all 3, you may build the monster costume in your bedroom. Go to the corkboard in your bedroom and select the cosplay widget (blue image) You can then select which monster costume to build. Again, you must have collect all 3 monster costumes to build and unlock a new monster. These links follow right to how to select levels as well as how to unlock the first level. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5HQICJ3Uw1w&list=PLz3MCOvWjtCqBn_bXHmJdmlXLlVSu721q&index=4

I hope you find this helpful. Please let us know if this fixes your issue with selecting levels and finding and building monster costumes. Thank you for playing!

reviews.review_description: Cool but multiplayer won't work

developer_response.body:
Hey! Thanks again for commenting. block Buster new multiplayer game modes are now live! hop into monster mash mode to compete with other players or co op free play with friends! Thank you again.

Hey Jake1244, thank you for letting us know you like Block Buster! Right now, multiplayer is limited to in room hangouts. You can have your friends over to your room by clicking on the host button. In the future, you and your friends will be able to join a city together and smash up the place in co-op free play. We hope this is the step in the right direction, and we appreciate your patience as we try to get the next phase of our game implemented. Thank you for your support and if you have other suggestions, want to talk giant monsters, or look for other players to visit, join our discord. There are always people looking to join up to hangout. https://discord.gg/EQZkzdcJtx

edit: Thank you for your suggestion for monsters and levels! We love hearing this! The bug is reported on and is being addressed.

reviews.review_description: Easily one of the funnest games on the oculus! I absolutely love it! A must have

developer_response.body:
Thank you! We're happy to hear you are enjoying Block Buster. We are actively making changes to support additional gameplay features so please stay tuned! If you would like to stay up to date on the teams progress or offer suggestions, you can find us here: https://discord.gg/6wKG7TGyhX

Be sure to copy the link in another browser. Thank you again for playing!

reviews.review_description:
This game is pretty addicting. It's really fun but after a little bit it gets annoying. I wish that other levels had different objectives and it's not just repetitive. I also wish there was more customization with the monsters. There should also be a mode where you are a real monster not just a kid in a costume. And there should be a gore mode where everything is even more gore. But other than these very picky critiques that I have this is a five star game. Very very fun and I would love to buy another game if one comes out.


(Edit) Thank you so much for responding to my review I am looking forward to the next update very very much.

developer_response.body: Thank you for letting us know you're enjoying Block Buster! We appreciate your feedback regarding the objective variety. It is something we hope to enhance in upcoming levels if possible. You will be happy to hear that within our next multiplayer update, you will see the real monsters rather than the person in the costume. It is our hope to be able to connect up to 4 players at once for free play coop. In the cities, you are portrayed as the real monster. In the bedroom, you are the kid in the costume. Thank you for expressing your thoughts on the gore mode. With the Quest 3 out, we are looking into visual enhancements and ways to improve the current game. If you have any feedback and want to share your thought, search us out on Discord @blockbustervr. Thank you for playing Block Buster, we most certainly appreciate your support!

reviews.review_description: It is a great experience please make more updates for new content or monsters in the future if you can.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for letting us know you enjoy Block Buster! We are working to deliver a huge update that includes more multiplayer features, unlockable items for you to work towards, and enhanced interactivity between humans and the environment.

Thanks again and if you would like to join our discord to suggest any monster or city ideas, you can find us here: https://discord.gg/EQZkzdcJtx

reviews.review_description: I love the game down to my heart still waiting for more people getting it but not to brag but I made to leave three and it’s black and white can there be a setting to change that. Also could you make leave three a little easier it’s way to confusing. All in all this game will last for a very long time! Thank you developers for responding and your hard work

developer_response.body:
Thank you for you review! We're happy  to hear you love Block Buster! Level 3 is a take on the classic King Kong movies with hints of color sprinkled in to help make it pop. 

We are currently putting together walk throughs on how to play! They should be available soon.

We currently don't have an option to set full color to level 3, but I have added this to our list of improvements!

Thank you again for your interest in Block Buster and we hope you keep smashing!

reviews.review_description: But the only thing is that I wish they would add more levels and monsters. edit: thank you so much for responding to my review it made my whole day other things I will also like: playing the levels with my friends with multiplayer,(this is a whole new idea I came up with just a few seconds ago) upgrading your room with karnage like adding more space and maybe even a second floor which has the next few levels like you have to upgrade to get the next few levels,and with that choosing the different styles of rooms after the one time like it could be like a lap over of the two rooms and you and place your collectibles in the new spots. and I really like the Kai tech secret zone on levels 2,4 and 5 also I LOVE the character machine of mayhem he is so cool and I wish his ability was better though but keep up the great work I genuinely love this game and I can’t wait for the future of it thank you so much :) ask me for ideas

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! We're glad to hear you are enjoying Block Buster. Monsters and cities are a hot topic within the community and we want to bring more of these features to the game. right now, our focus remains on expanding multiplayer and adding leaderboards, achievements and other engaging things that we think you all will love! Thank you again for your support and stay tuned for when we DO add more monsters!

reviews.review_description: The game is very enjoyable and fun. I love how you’re able to smash stuff in the game and breeze fire but there is one problem there’s a costume piece which is the head that’s missing and it’s impossible for me to finish the first level and going to the next one

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing Block Buster. Were happy to hear you're having fun! Sorry to hear you cannot find the final piece of the costume. Make sure you check in all the water areas, the area near the red bridge, and the center of the map. Those hints should set you on the right path! We also have tutorials for new players here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLz3MCOvWjtCqBn_bXHmJdmlXLlVSu721q

make sure to copy and paste that link inside your browser to follow it. We hope this information helps! Thank you again for playing!

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game! There should be more giant monster games like this! Although  I'm disappointed by the mech of mayhem. Can you please make the mech of mayhem shoot long lasers? Because when I looked at the box art for it It looked like it would shoot lasers. Anyway, great game! Five *

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review! We're glad to hear you are having a blast! I'm sending this suggestion to the team now, apologies if there was a misunderstanding!

The Mechine of Mayhem has a unique ability with its rocket fists. After you charge your power, release the triggers to fire your fist. Press the trigger buttons again while the fist is extended to make them explode! You can also grab items from a distance while the hands are extended. 

We have a tutorial on how to use the Mech's power here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLz3MCOvWjtCqBn_bXHmJdmlXLlVSu721q

Thank you for playing!

reviews.review_description:
Great fun with my son stomping around like Godzilla. Only teleport movement which is a little disappointing but a lot of fun still.

Edit: thanks for the reply and after some more playing this game is just pure fun! Being a kaiju and smashing through the city is amazing. The teleport movement gets normal very quick and if you “monster mash” both thumb sticks you feel like a giant kaiju terrorizing a city. Looking forward to what else this game has to offer!

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: We're excited to inform you that smooth movement is now available in Block Buster. We hope your son has a great time running through buildings as the monster! Thank you for your feedback on our movement choices. Stay tuned for more updates!

We're happy to hear you and your son are fulfilling your fantasies of being the monster in the city! Thank you for playing and reviewing. We will be exploring our locomotion to see if we can deliver a better quality experience. In the mean time, please join our discord to stay updated on our progress and to provide even more feedback! https://discord.gg/6sUxfZ4h

reviews.review_description:
This game is so delightful and accessible, I’m using it to introduce all of my guests to VR.  The gameplay is silly and immersive, and the blocky style unlocks my inner child, making it great for any audience. I can be satisfied with a 15 minute session or 4 hours.

With this game coming from a new developer, I’m looking forward to seeing how it can grow after launch.  I see concerns here about the unconventional controls and zone loading system, but I found them to be engagingly outside the box, and part of the overall charm this game delivers. Have a happy rampage!

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: Thank you again for support! We're excited to inform you that smooth movement is now available in Block Buster. We appreciate everyone's feedback on our movement choices and think this addition adds a really fun layer to the game. So thanks for the suggestions. Please keep them coming and stay tuned for more updates!

Edit: Thank you again for your support! We've been listening to all the great feedback from players, and we are happy to say we are making changes to improve gameplay! We are currently working towards smooth movement and additional multiplayer game modes. Thank you again for playing Block Buster! We hope our changes are a step in the right direction.

You can join our discord here if you would like to offer feedback and suggestions: https://discord.gg/6wKG7TGyhX

We also have a huge playlist of videos on Youtube for new and current players: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLz3MCOvWjtCqBn_bXHmJdmlXLlVSu721q

Thank you for your review! We're happy to hear you are enjoying smashing, bashing and everything in between. There's still lots to do so please join our discord to stay up to date and provide more feedback to our team! https://discord.gg/6sUxfZ4h

reviews.review_description: Levels are not Explained ￼what do we do on level1?

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: We're excited to inform you that smooth movement is now available in Block Buster. We hope this enhances your experience! Stay tuned for more updates!

Thanks for your feedback. Make sure to check your objective notebook in the bedroom for primary and secondary objectives. Primary objectives must be completed in order to unlock the next level.

If you have more questions please join our discord. 
https://discord.gg/SHqZ3udF
We should have tips and hints available soon!

reviews.review_description: This isn’t really a review but can someone please tell me where the GorIlla kit 2 is on the mountain map

developer_response.body:
**Update: We now have tutorials available: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLz3MCOvWjtCqBn_bXHmJdmlXLlVSu721q

Hello and thanks for playing! We are just finishing up a whole series of videos that will give players tips and hints just like this. So we will update this with a link soon, but here's some help for now. 

Explore the areas between zones on Mt. Sakura to find the costume boxes. The mountain features three large stone carvings that depict the ancient history of the island. Find them all and you will be on the right track.

If you have more questions you can always join our discord:https://discord.gg/azJZDFq3

Let us know if this helps!

reviews.review_description: I recommend this game to any kaiju fans like godzilla fans!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your support and letting us know you're having a lot of fun!

reviews.review_title: Has potential, but very far off.
reviews.review_description:
Pros:
For the Rampage and Kaiju/GodZilla fans out there, this is the start of something epic. You’re put into the eyes of a city-destroying rampage, everything you can see can be demolished, picked up and thrown, and in many cases eaten (which is how you power up). An interesting take on forward movement is a back and forth teleport of the sticks, allowing you to move quickly if you alternate them or more gradual with one. When your power meter is full, pull the triggers to charge and let loose a devastating attack that fries anything in your line of sight.
Cons: (it’s a long one, sit back and relax)
Unfortunately, the magic and appeal ends quickly when you play. The cities don’t actually demolish, they just break apart into large blocks that either randomly disappear or begin to clutter up the playing field and become quite the annoyance when you’re looking for something. The movement… that’s why this review features only two stars. You will bounce around EVERYwhere when you try to look around with the snap turning, the system is highly bugged and your character will turn in the wrong directions some of the time and randomly teleport many steps away from where you were. It can be very difficult to grab a person to eat and many times you’ll step on them because the game genuinely has trouble distinguishing the movements you’re trying to tell it. Hit detection, especially for throwing, is spotty and you’ll watch your throws sail in random directions or repeatedly try to grab a lever and fail. I was having some level of enjoyment despite all the problems until I found the first secret area enemy, a giant laser. As I attempted to rush up to it, my character literally turned to face a different direction seven times and randomly teleported twice, it took most of my health out just to get to it. When I attempted to grab or punch it, nothing happened due to the hit detection, and throwing one of the many cluttered boxes at it also seemed to do nothing. Couple this with military infantry, vehicles, and planes all shooting at you? The terribly broken controls can’t accommodate all this, and you end up waving your arms about in frustration because of them. The decision to do teleport walking AND snap turning was a very poor one to start with, and I doubt even smooth turning will save this unless they can really refine the play controls a LOT.
Summary:
You’ll have some marginal fun off of this, but you’ll be frustrated as well. If you’re desperate to become a Kaiju and destroy a city, you’ll get your fix for a while, but my excitement for this died quickly and I’ll be submitting for a refund.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: Hey Kingjymbo! Hope you are well. Just so you know, Block Buster has lots of new features including 2 new multiplayer modes within the first 2 levels. We are releasing more updates this summer.

UPDATE: We're excited to inform you that smooth movement is now available in Block Buster! We appreciate your feedback on our movement choices and think this addition adds a really fun layer to the game. So thanks for the suggestions. Please keep them coming and stay tuned for more updates!

Hello, we're sorry to hear that Block Buster wasn't for you. It seems like you may have missed our most recent update which added smooth turning based off all the useful feedback we have received from players. We realize that won't solve all your issues, but it is our first step toward smoothing out peoples locomotion concerns. 

If you could share video of your teleportation problem with us on Discord that would be very helpful as this sounds like a user specific issue, and may have to do with your hardware. We also added an option so players can toggle off turning on individual controllers to help combat stick drift. This may help in your case.

If you'd like to give us more feedback or share videos with us you can find our discord here. https://discord.gg/6wKG7TGyhX 

Info on first update: https://youtu.be/-2CbFxUXoY8

Just copy the links over to a browser since it will not direct you from this comment. Thanks for trying the game.

reviews.review_description:
Ok so this game is super fun going all Godzilla-like destroying a city but it's super hard I think it should have a type of easier difficulty also when you get a new character figuring out how to start using it was kind of confusing for me. But it is super good. I love the fact that when you hold the toy thing of the creatures, they come to look at you in the window.





( I tried putting a discount code here wont work, sorry)




To the devs. Thank you. i have been waiting for the easier and harder difficulties for a while now, and it will make the game so much more fun. One more thing, though, you should add a bit easier way to aim when you throw something like a building.

developer_response.body: We're glad we could help make Block Buster better for you! We hope the new settings are a step in the right direction. Thank you for playing and stay tuned for more updates!

reviews.review_description:
Bought this game when it first came out and I’m so happy I did! You can easily lose hours creating chaos, and it’s a great way to let go of real life stresses and let your inner child run wild.
So excited to see what else this game and company have in store for us! 10/10

developer_response.body:
Hey!! That's great to hear. Thank you for your support since day 1. We really appreciate it. Stay tuned for updates as we roll them out! Thank you again.

Please be sure to join our discord if you'd like to stay updated on Block Buster's progress! https://discord.gg/6wKG7TGyhX

Thanks again.
